entries.definition:
r–ṣ–ṣ to line up, to align, to set together in a row or stack, to
pile up, to fit together tightly; lead, soldering with lead. Of this
root, مَرْصُوص marṣūṣ occurs once in the Qur’an.

مَرْصُوص marṣūṣ [pass. part.] tightly fitted, well lined up (61:4)
إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذِينَ يُقَاتِلُونَ فِي سَبِيلِهِ صَفًّا كَأَنَّهُمْ بُنْيَانٌ مَرْصُوصٌ God truly loves
those who fight in close ranks for His cause, like a
well-compacted wall.
